PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT REQUESTS TO CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR TIME TO PREPARE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE; BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT; PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)

DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOMKINS, AMY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED APR-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YI, FRANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMKINS, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YI, FRANK $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,190.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT IT WAS UNREASONABLE FOR DEFENDANT TO WAIT TO CHARGE PLAINTIFF FOR ALL UTILITY BILLS FOR SEVERAL YEARS UNTIL THE END OF THE LEASE. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN WITHHELD AND SHOULD BE RETURNED IN FULL. HOWEVER, THE COURT DID NOT FIND THAT DEFENDANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH, AND THUS DECLINES TO AWARD MULTIPLE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
